CreateCdsDisk.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string of up to 64 characters. See [Idempotency](BCC/API参考/通用说明.md#幂等性).
CreateCdsDisk.purchaseCount: Number of CDS disks to create in batch; must be a positive integer, max 5 per request. Optional, defaults to 1.
CreateCdsDisk.name: New disk name. Supports uppercase/lowercase letters, digits, Chinese characters, and special characters -_ /. Must start with a letter, length 1–65.
CreateCdsDisk.description: New disk description. Supports Chinese, letters, digits, period ".", space, underscore "_", hyphen "-", equals "=", comma ",", Chinese comma "，", colon "：", slash "/" and Chinese period "。".
CreateCdsDisk.cdsSizeInGB: CDS disk capacity in GB; must be a positive integer, range 5–32765 GB. SSD disks require a minimum of 50 GB. Required when snapshotId is empty or absent.
CreateCdsDisk.storageType: CDS disk storage type: enhanced_ssd_pl1 (Enhanced SSD PL1), enhanced_ssd_pl2 (Enhanced SSD PL2), cloud_hp1 or premium_ssd (General SSD), hp1 or ssd (High-Performance Cloud Disk). Defaults to hp1.
CreateCdsDisk.storageType.sata: Previous-generation cloud disk, dedicated for DCC sub-instance creation
CreateCdsDisk.storageType.local_ssd: Data stored on local SSD; low latency, good I/O and throughput; suitable for medium-to-large relational database workloads
CreateCdsDisk.storageType.local_hdd 或 std1: Local HDD disk, suitable for large-scale data storage scenarios
CreateCdsDisk.storageType.local_nvme 或 nvme: Local NVMe disk; data stored on local NVMe SSD; ultra-high performance; suitable for latency-sensitive workloads
CreateCdsDisk.chargeType: Billing type: Prepaid or Postpaid. Required only when instanceId is non-empty and the instance is prepaid. If instanceId is empty, a postpaid CDS is created. If instanceId is non-empty: specify chargeType for prepaid instances; postpaid CDS is created for postpaid instances.
CreateCdsDisk.snapshotId: Snapshot ID for creating a disk from a snapshot. When present and non-empty, cdsSizeInGB is ignored and becomes optional.
CreateCdsDisk.shareSnapshotId: Shared snapshot ID for creating a disk from a shared snapshot. When present and non-empty, cdsSizeInGB is ignored and becomes optional.
CreateCdsDisk.zoneName: Availability zone. Defaults to empty; the system selects automatically.
CreateCdsDisk.autoSnapshotPolicy: Auto snapshot policy currently configured for the disk
CreateCdsDisk.autoSnapshotPolicy.name: Auto snapshot policy name. Supports uppercase/lowercase letters, digits, Chinese characters, and special characters -_ /. Must start with a letter, length 1–65.
CreateCdsDisk.autoSnapshotPolicy.timePoints: Creation time points for auto snapshots. Hourly granularity; 24 options from 00:00–23:00, represented as integers 0–23 (e.g., 1 = 01:00). Multiple values allowed. JSON Array format: [0, 1, … 23], max 24 points, comma-separated.
CreateCdsDisk.autoSnapshotPolicy.repeatWeekdays: Repeat days for auto snapshots. Select days Monday–Sunday as integers 0–6 (e.g., 0 = Monday). Multiple values allowed. JSON Array format: [0, 1, … 6].
CreateCdsDisk.autoSnapshotPolicy.status: Snapshot policy status: active, deleted, or paused
CreateCdsDisk.autoSnapshotPolicy.retentionDays: Retention period for auto snapshots in days. -1: retain permanently; 1–65536: retain for specified days.
CreateCdsDisk.autoSnapshotPolicy.createdTime: Creation time of the auto snapshot policy, in BCE date format (this and subsequent fields are not returned in the volume API)
CreateCdsDisk.autoSnapshotPolicy.updatedTime: Last update time of the auto snapshot policy, in BCE date format
CreateCdsDisk.autoSnapshotPolicy.deletedTime: Deletion time of the auto snapshot policy, in BCE date format
CreateCdsDisk.autoSnapshotPolicy.lastExecuteTime: Last execution time of the auto snapshot policy, in BCE date format
CreateCdsDisk.renewTimeUnit: Renewal unit: "month" for monthly, "year" for yearly. **Deprecated.** When creating a prepaid CDS attached to a BCC with auto-renewal enabled, the CDS automatically adopts the same renewal cycle as the BCC instance.
CreateCdsDisk.renewTime: Auto-renewal duration: 1–9 for monthly, 1–3 for yearly. **Deprecated.** When creating a prepaid CDS attached to a BCC with auto-renewal enabled, the CDS automatically adopts the same renewal cycle as the BCC instance.
CreateCdsDisk.instanceId: Create and attach the disk to the specified instance. Prepaid CDS must be attached to a prepaid BCC. **Note:** When creating a prepaid CDS attached to a BCC with auto-renewal enabled, the CDS automatically adopts the same renewal cycle as the BCC instance.
CreateCdsDisk.relationTag: Whether to associate the specified tags of the CDS to be created with existing tag keys. Defaults to false. When set to true, ensure the tag key already exists.
CreateCdsDisk.deleteWithInstance: Delete disk with instance. Effective only for pay-as-you-go billing; defaults to false. For V2 API, the cdsAttributeActive parameter must be set to true when releasing the instance.
CreateCdsDisk.billing: Purchase duration for prepaid disk. Defaults to aligning with the BCC expiration time; the prepaid disk expiration must be no earlier than the BCC expiration time.
CreateCdsDisk.billing.paymentTiming: Payment method: Prepaid, Postpaid, or bidding (spot instance)
CreateCdsDisk.billing.reservation: Reservation info. Not required for postpaid; required for prepaid.
